caption:
Most owners diagnose their marketing backwards.

They see slow bookings and assume they need more leads. Sometimes that's true. Often it isn't.

Two numbers actually decide what to fix first: how many leads you generate, and how fast you respond to them. Plot yourself on both and the fix gets obvious.

High leads, slow response? You don't have a marketing problem. You have a leak. Most leads that don't get a fast callback are gone before your team ever dials back.

Low leads, fast response? That's the one quadrant where spending more on ads is actually the right call.

DM "GROWTH" and Black Arrow will tell you which quadrant you're in.

#ServiceBusiness #LeadGeneration #SmallBusinessGrowth #HomeServices #MarketingStrategy
rationale: Carousels lead saves and depth for B2B/educational content, and this gives owners a genuine, unclaimed decision framework (lead volume vs. response speed) distinct from the four-system mental model and forensic diagnostic already shipped. The invented response-rate statistic was removed and replaced with an honest directional pattern to keep every claim defensible.
